Describe the visual characteristics of the food items and the storefront exterior.
canonical_answer: At 10s, golden-brown fried dough pieces appear piled together; at 12s, green awnings cover storefronts below a beige wall; at 16s, baked goods show golden brown tops with lighter centers; at 18s, the pastry reveals soft layered inside as it separates.

question: Describe the sequence of actions and scene changes involving the bakery.
canonical_answer: At 10s, stationary fried dough pieces are shown in close-up; at 12s, the scene shifts to a bakery exterior with green awnings; at 16s, a hand lifts a round baked good from the group; at 18s, two hands tear open the golden-brown pastry.
